summary: Russian forces used the "Yolka" anti-aircraft drone to perform a kinetic intercept of a Ukrainian fixed-wing UAV in the special military operation zone in Spring 2026. On March 11, 2026, Rubicon Center operators conducted combat operations across multiple directions, destroying 104 Ukrainian Armed Forces targets, including personnel and fixed-wing UAVs. In Dobropole, a Ukrainian MaxxPro armored vehicle was destroyed by a fiber-optic FPV drone "Barmaley" operated by the 56th Separate Airborne Assault Brigade. Ukrainian forces are increasingly deploying "Molniya" strike and reconnaissance drones, which Russian electronic warfare systems can detect but struggle to counter due to unknown control frequencies.
